payload.text: You are standing in a narrow hall smelling faintly of salt and dust.

payload.generator_hint: A hidden room or passage west of the hall. It should feel older and colder than the visible house.

payload.text: Behind the velvet curtain, the boards seem to fall away into a colder space. Portraits line the walls, but their faces have been scraped to pale ovals.
I like that. Commit it west of the hall.
